Sheltering Cap.name: 庇护帽 Sheltering Cap
Sheltering Cap.description:
你坚固的帽子是一件无价的工具，能够保护你的重要器官免受伤害。你以防御姿态举起帽子，在直到你下个回合开始前获得对AC的+1环境加值。

Your sturdy cap is an invaluable tool for protecting your vital organs from harm. You raise your cap defensively, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the beginning of your next turn.

Primal Transport.name: 原始传送 Primal Transport
Primal Transport.description:
你找到了一种方法，利用你的蕈灵巨龙魔法在某些森林固定物之间传送。如果你是林木巨龙，你可以请求树精和树木援助以缩短旅程。如果你是伞菌巨龙，你则发现了一种让自己通过蘑菇环（也称为仙灵环）进行传送的方法，正如传奇所说，仙灵也能如此。你每天一次可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.F1qxaqsEItmBura2] 作为先天原初法术施放。如果你是林木巨龙，它如常运作；但如果你是伞菌巨龙，则你不是在两棵树之间传送，而是在两个仙灵环之间传送。

You've found a way to use your leshy dragon magic to transport between certain forest fixtures. If you're an arboreal dragon, you can ask the dryads and trees for aid to shorten your journey. If you're a toadstool dragon, you've instead found a way to transport yourself through rings of mushrooms, also known as fairy rings, much as fairies can according to legend. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.F1qxaqsEItmBura2] as an innate primal spell once per day. If you're an arboreal dragon, this works as normal, but if you're a toadstool dragon, instead of transporting yourself between two trees, you transport between two fairy rings.

Ghost Lantern.name: 幽灵（特征）灯笼 Ghost Lantern
Ghost Lantern.description:
你的形态尤为阴森。你可能在漂浮的光芒核心携带一颗幽魂骷髅，或许环绕你的光之触须与骷髅手指有着令人不安的相似之处。你获得“威吓”技能的受训（熟练度）；如果你已在“威吓”中为受训（熟练度），则改为在你选择的一项技能中获得受训（熟练度）。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} 技能专长。每当你 [[/act demoralize]] 一名生物时，你可以在其之前以自由动作（）压制或恢复你天生的辉光。

Your form is particularly eerie. You might carry a spectral skull at the heart of your floating light, or perhaps the tendrils of light that surround you bear an uncanny resemblance to skeletal fingers. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Intimidation; if you were already trained in Intimidation, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat. Whenever you [[/act demoralize]] a creature, you can suppress or resume your natural glow as a free action just before.

Night Light.name: 夜光 Night Light
Night Light.description:
频率 每小时一次

你将周围环境中的所有光吸入体内，像斗篷一样披在身上，同时将其他一切投入彻底的黑暗之中。持续1分钟，你在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:5]中散发明亮光照，但在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:25]中的所有其他方格都被投入彻底的黑暗。你可以清晰地看穿你创造的黑暗，但其他具有黑暗视觉（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）的生物几乎无法看穿环绕着你的黑暗。他们将透过黑暗看到的目标视为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

Frequency once per hour

You draw in all light from your surroundings, wearing it like a cloak while casting everything else into pitch blackness. For 1 minute, you shed bright light in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5], but all other squares in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:25] are cast into pitch darkness. You can see clearly through the darkness you've created, but other creatures with darkvision (but not greater darkvision) can barely see through the darkness that surrounds you. They treat targets seen through the darkness as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Fungal Emissary.name: 真菌使者 Fungal Emissary
Fungal Emissary.description:
你花了大量时间在各个社群之间担任使者，或许作为你的蘑菇人村落对外界的代表。你很擅长让大群人站在你这边。你在交涉中成为受训，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression}技能专长。若你在使用Group Impression成功对一群人[[/act make-an-impression]]之后，尝试对该群人[[/act gather-information options="fungal-emissary"]]，你在这次尝试中获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4RjDxgvNXNl5GG9d]{Hobnobber}技能专长的好处。

特殊 若你拥有Hobnobber技能专长，则你改为在成功的Group Impression之后，对收集情报检定获得+1环境加值（若你在交涉中为大师则为+2）。

You've spent considerable time serving as an emissary between communities, perhaps as a representative of your mushie village to the outside world. You're well-versed in getting large groups of people on your side. You become trained in Diplomacy, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression} skill feat. If you attempt to [[/act gather-information options="fungal-emissary"]] with a group of people after using Group Impression to successfully [[/act make-an-impression]] on them, you gain the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4RjDxgvNXNl5GG9d]{Hobnobber} skill feat on the attempt.

Special If you have the Hobnobber skill feat, you instead gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Gather Information checks after successful Group Impressions (+2 if you are a master in Diplomacy).

Leshy Roots.name: 莱西根系 Leshy Roots
Leshy Roots.description:
你比其他莱西龙更接近自己的莱西根源。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{收养族裔}通用专长，选择莱西族裔，尽管该专长通常仅对常见族裔开放；你还获得一个1级莱西族裔专长。你可以选择需要你对应莱西传承的莱西族裔专长（树叶莱西对应林木龙，莲花莱西对应花卉龙，葫芦莱西对应丰收龙，海藻莱西对应海带龙，或真菌莱西对应伞菇龙），并且任何基于莱西传承而影响真菌或植物的专长（如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.kpn4R65YlD38iAIS]{仪式回归}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KYKK1vLqGIxXH5Tu]{与同类交谈}）都与对应的莱西传承相匹配。

You are closer to your leshy roots than other leshy dragons. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat, for the leshy ancestry, even though that feat is normally only available for common ancestries, and you also gain one 1st-level leshy ancestry feat. You can take leshy ancestry feats that require your corresponding leshy heritage (leaf leshy for arboreal dragon, lotus leshy for floral dragon, gourd leshy for harvest dragon, seaweed leshy for kelp dragon, or fungus leshy for toadstool dragon), and any feats that affect fungi or plants based on leshy heritage like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.kpn4R65YlD38iAIS]{Ritual Reversion} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KYKK1vLqGIxXH5Tu]{Speak with Kindred} match the corresponding leshy heritage.

Rescuing Light.name: 拯救光 Rescuing Light
Rescuing Light.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 你的微光族裔能力处于激活状态，且你正在控制一个可移动的魔法光源（例如一个光法术或星座小精灵的星座之光之一）

触发 一次攻击命中你，并将对你造成伤害。

在伤害降临你的瞬间，你撤退到更安全的地点。选择一个位于60英尺内且在你的效果线内、并包含一个由你控制的可移动魔法光源的方格。你与该光源交换位置，获得10点对所有由触发攻击造成的伤害的抗力，然后传送至该光源原本所在的方格（若其方格为无效目标，则传送至最近的未被占据的方格）。该光源熄灭。

Frequency once per day

Requirements your glow ancestry ability is active and you are controlling a mobile magical light source (such as a light spell or one of the constellation lights of a constellation wisp)

Trigger An attack hits you and would deal damage to you.

In the moment that harm befalls you, you retreat to safer ground. Choose a square with 60 feet and in your line of effect that contains a mobile magical light source under your control. You switch places with that light source, gaining resistance 10 to all damage dealt by the triggering attack, then teleporting to the light's original square (or the nearest unoccupied square if its square is an invalid target). The light source goes out.

Negate Magic.name: 抵消魔法 Negate Magic
Negate Magic.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你成为某个法术的目标或处于该法术的区域内

你也许不是折磨鬼火，但你已经摸索出一种技巧，用以复制它们反魔法能力的一部分。希望你没有为此牺牲什么太重要的东西作为回报。你尝试对该法术进行一次 @Check[class-spell]{反制} 检定。你的反制位阶等于你等级的一半（向上取整），你的反制调整值等于你的职业DC –10与法术DC –10中较高者。若成功，你不受该法术影响，但该法术仍会如常影响其他目标或区域内的生物。

Frequency once per day

Trigger you are targeted by or in the area of a spell

You might not be a tormentor wisp, but you've figured out a trick for replicating a portion of their antimagic abilities. Hopefully you didn't have to sacrifice anything too important in return. You attempt a @Check[class-spell]{Counteract} check against the spell. Your counteract rank is equal to half your level rounded up and your counteract modifier is equal to the higher of your class DC –10 or your spell DC –10. On a success, you are unaffected by the spell, but it affects other targets or creatures in the area normally.

Follow the Light.name: 追随光 Follow the Light
Follow the Light.description:
频率 每日一次

你闪烁起舞，引诱毫无戒心者走向毁灭。选择至多三个30尺内的生物进行引诱。你的每个目标必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，结果如下。被你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷} 的生物，其豁免检定承受–2环境减值。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物必须在其下个回合将第一个动作用于接近你。

大失败 该生物必须在其下个回合将其所有动作用于接近你。一旦其与你相邻，他们会因被你的光所摄而呆立不动，从而浪费任何剩余动作。

Frequency once per day

You flicker and dance to draw the unwary to their doom. Choose up to three creatures within 30 feet to lure in. Each of your targets must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, with the following results. Creatures @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by you take a –2 circumstance penalty to their saving throws.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature must spend the first action on their next turn to approach you.

Critical Failure The creature must use all of their actions on their next turn to approach you. Once they are adjacent to you, they waste any remaining actions by standing still, transfixed by your light.

Radiant Rush.name: 光辉冲锋 Radiant Rush
Radiant Rush.description:
频率 每日一次

你变形为一道光束，灼烧路径上的一切。该线段连接你的方格与120英尺内一个未被占据的方格。线段上的所有生物承受 @Damage[14d6[@actor.flags.pf2e.lightSource]] 伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。伤害类型由你的光源族裔能力决定。然后你出现在该线段远端的未被占据方格中。

此过程以光速将你重新定位，从而阻止由你的 Radiant Rush 触发的反应动作（），但仍允许那些能够以同等速度作出反应并影响光的反应动作（）。

Frequency once per day

You transform into a beam of light that burns everything in its path. The line connects your square to an unoccupied square within 120 feet. All creatures in the line take @Damage[14d6[@actor.flags.pf2e.lightSource]] damage, with a basic Reflex save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The damage type is determined by your light source ancestry ability. You then appear in the unoccupied square at the far end of the line.

This process relocates you at the speed of light, preventing reactions triggered by your Radiant Rush, except ones that could react at the same speed and affect light.

Shadowsight.name: 暗影视觉 Shadowsight
Shadowsight.description:
大多数鬼火依靠其天然的辉光来视物，但你的双眼已适应昏暗的状态。你获得微光视野。如果你已经拥有微光视野，你获得黑暗视觉。

特殊 你可以选择此专长两次，以先获得微光视野，再获得黑暗视觉。

Most will-o'-wisps rely on their natural glow to see, but your eyes have adapted to murky conditions. You gain low-light vision. If you already have low-light vision, you gain darkvision.

Special You can take this feat twice in order to gain low-light vision and then darkvision.

Will-o-Wisp Lore.name: 鬼火学识 Will-o-Wisp Lore
Will-o-Wisp Lore.description:
你举止优雅，并培养出一股神秘的灵光。无论你是运用自己在诡计方面的天赋成为一位仁慈的向导，还是致命的陷阱，你都拥抱那些先行者的根源。你获得体操和欺瞒的受训（熟练度）。如果你本会在这些技能之一上自动成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）。

你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}通用专长，选择鬼火学识。

You move with grace and cultivate an aura of mystery. Whether you use your knack for subterfuge to be a benevolent guide or a deadly snare, you embrace the traditions of those who came before you. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Acrobatics and Deception. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Will-o'-Wisp Lore.

Mushie Lore.name: 蘑菇学识 Mushie Lore
Mushie Lore.description:
你研究过众多蘑菇人社群的文化，并且你知道无论流落到何处都能生长并茁壮。

你获得自然与生存的受训（熟练度）。如果你会自动在这些技能之一中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。

你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}通用专长，用于蘑菇人学识。

You've studied the cultures of numerous mushie communities, and you know how to grow and thrive wherever you wind up.

You gain the trained proficiency rank in Nature and Survival. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Mushie Lore.

Twinkling Flight.name: 闪烁飞行 Twinkling Flight
Twinkling Flight.description:
你不再贴近地面，而是可以飞向天空，如同上方的群星般闪烁。你始终拥有25英尺的飞行速度。

Instead of staying near the ground, you can take to the sky, twinkling like the stars above. You have a fly Speed of 25 feet at all times.

Collective Aid.name: 集体援助 Collective Aid
Collective Aid.description:
你引导天界的协作本质（若你是乐园龙），或你在大型群落中的群居生活（若你是伞菌龙），以更轻松地协助你的盟友。你在进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助}的检定时获得+4环境加值。

You channel the collaborative nature of Heaven, if you're a paradise dragon, or your communal life in large colonies, if you're a toadstool dragon, to more easily assist your allies. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus on checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid}.

Spore Shot.name: 孢子射击 Spore Shot
Spore Shot.description:
你会产生用于自我防卫的特化孢子，并能以加压的空气气流将其从体内发射出去。你获得一次孢子射程徒手攻击，射程增量为30尺，造成1d4点毒素伤害，并具有多用心灵（特征）。若你是幻象菇菇，则将多用心灵替换为多用灵体；若你是敲击菇菇，则替换为多用音波；若你是球状菇菇，则替换为多用酸液。

孢子徒手攻击在大成功或大失败命中时会产生额外效果，取决于伤害类型。孢子不会加入重击专精效果。

酸液：伴随孢子的黏稠黏液怪会粘住目标。其速度在你下个回合开始前，或直到其逃脱为止（以先发生者为准），承受–10尺环境减值。逃脱DC等于你的职业DC。@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.effects.Item.FnNxnFx8DmC5HmGU]{效果: Spore Shot}

毒素：有毒孢子会削弱目标的力量。目标在你下个回合开始前为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。

心灵：孢子会引发令人迷失方向的幻觉。目标在你下个回合开始前为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。

音波：喧嚣声浪淹没目标的耳朵。目标@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} 1分钟。

灵体：孢子会短暂附着于目标的灵魂。目标必须在对抗你的职业DC时于@Check[fortitude|against:class]豁免中成功，否则为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

You produce specialized spores for self-defense, which you can launch from your body on pressurized currents of air. You gain a spore ranged unarmed attack with a range increment of 30 feet that deals 1d4 poison damage with the versatile mental trait. Replace versatile mental with versatile spirit if you are a phantasmal mushie, versatile sonic if you are a percussive mushie, or versatile acid if you're a bulbous mushie.

The spore unarmed attack has additional effects on a critical hit, depending on the damage type. Spores do not add critical specialization effects.

Acid: The gooey slime that accompanies the spores sticks to the target. It takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until the start of your next turn or until it Escapes. The Escape DC is equal to your class DC, whichever comes first. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.effects.Item.FnNxnFx8DmC5HmGU]{Effect: Spore Shot}

Poison: The toxic spores sap the target's strength. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Mental: The spores induce disorienting hallucinations. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the start of your next turn.

Sonic: The din overwhelms the target's ears. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute.

Spirit: The spores momentarily latch on to the target's soul. The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Drink Essence.name: 饮取精华 Drink Essence
Drink Essence.description:
频率 每小时一次

你将根系扎入相邻的一个生物，汲取其生命力以强化你自身的活力。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，以对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。若你是幻灵菇菇，这些根系是形而上的触须，会钩住其灵魂；若你是树视菇菇，它们则是会钻入其身体的实体根系。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}，或若其已处于 drained 状态则其 drained 值增加 1（至多为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}）。你获得等同于该生物等级一半的临时生命值，持续 1 分钟。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}，或若其已处于 drained 状态则其 drained 值增加 2（至多为 drained 3）。你获得等同于该生物等级的临时生命值，持续 1 分钟。

Frequency once per hour

You sink roots into an adjacent creature, draining them to bolster your own vitality. The creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. If you're a phantasmal mushie, these roots are metaphysical tendrils that hook into their soul; if you're a treesighted mushie, they are instead physical roots that burrow into their body.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} or increases its drained value by 1 if it was already drained (to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}). You gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half the creature's level for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}, or increases its drained value by 2 if it was already drained (to a maximum of drained 3). You gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to the creature's level for 1 minute.

Unerring Illumination.name: 无误照明 Unerring Illumination
Unerring Illumination.description:
精明的鬼火会持续警戒那些看不见的敌人，随时准备将它们带入无可逃脱的光之中。即使是臭名昭著的折磨者鬼火，当你决定照亮它们时也无法逃脱。你每小时一次可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0qaqksrGGDj74HXE] 作为天生的异术法术施放。

Canny will-o'-wisps remain on-guard against foes that can't be seen, ready to bring them into inescapable light. Even the notorious tormentor wisps can't escape when you decide to illuminate them. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0qaqksrGGDj74HXE] as an innate occult spell once per hour.

Telepathic Spores.name: 心灵感应孢子 Telepathic Spores
Telepathic Spores.description:
你用原始魔法强化了你的信号孢子，使它们能够向所有类型的生物传递信息，而不只是菌类。

你获得射程为30英尺的心灵感应。这使你能够与所列射程内的任何生物进行心灵交流，只要你们共享一种语言。这不会让你获得对其思想的任何特殊许可，并且所传达的信息不会比正常言语更多。

在17级时，心灵感应的射程增加到100英尺。

You've augmented your signaling spores with primal magic, allowing them to transmit information to all types of creatures, not just fungi.

You gain telepathy with a range of 30 feet. This allows you to communicate mentally with any creatures within the listed range, as long as you share a language. This doesn't give you any special access to their thoughts, and communicates no more information than normal speech would.

At 17th level, the range of telepathy increases to 100 feet.

Towering Thicket.name: 高耸灌木丛 Towering Thicket
Towering Thicket.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你刺激你的真菌身躯以令人眩晕的速度膨胀。新生长扩大了你的触及并增强了你的力量。你获得4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV] 的效果，持续1分钟。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You spur your fungal body to expand at a dizzying rate. The new growth expands your reach and bolsters your strength. You gain the effects of 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV] for 1 minute.

Spore Talk.name: 孢子交谈 Spore Talk
Spore Talk.description:
你的信号孢子所携带的不仅仅是关于你情绪的微妙信息。借助你的孢子，你可以将特定词语无声地传达给10英尺内所有有感知能力的真菌。真菌只有在它们与你使用相同语言时才能理解你。

Your signaling spores carry more than just subtle information about your moods. Using your spores, you can communicate specific words silently to all sapient fungi within 10 feet. Fungi only understand you if they share the language you are using.

Unerring Navigator.name: 百发百中的领航员 Unerring Navigator
Unerring Navigator.description:
在令人困惑的地形中辨明方向对你而言已是本能。你可能会运用你的能力引导他人找到宝藏，或在带领他人进入你自己阴险的迷宫时避免迷路。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tXa5vOu5giBNCjdR] 作为一种天生的异界戏法施放。你这样做时，你可以选择如常从该法术获得信息，或选择120尺内的一个目标并将信息传递给对方。当你以非自身的生物为目标时，对方要么会突然意识到北方的方向，要么会获得一种模糊的印象，回忆起你上次到访该地点时它的样子。该印象的细节不足，无法提供比你用素描或描述所能表达的更多信息。

Orienting yourself in confusing terrain is second nature. You might use your abilities to guide others to treasure, or to avoid getting lost while leading others into your own devious mazes. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tXa5vOu5giBNCjdR] as an innate occult cantrip. When you do, you can either receive the information from the spell normally or choose a target within 120 feet and transmit the information to them. When you target a creature that isn't yourself, they either receive a sudden awareness of which direction is north or a vague impression of what the location looked like the last time you were there. This impression isn't detailed enough to provide more information than you could with a sketch or description.

Harmless Hillock.name: 无害小丘 Harmless Hillock
Harmless Hillock.description:
你安顿下来，并将自己伪装成一座小型天然土丘。直到你下次采取动作前，你看起来像是一堆覆有草地与矮小常绿灌木的土堆。你获得 +2 环境加值，用于 [[/act impersonate options="impersonate:hillock"]] 一座土丘的欺瞒检定与DC，并且如果你在欺瞒上未受训，你对欺瞒检定的熟练度加值等同于你的等级。伪装成土丘只需要你花费 1 动作，而非 10 分钟，并且不需要你拥有伪装工具包。

You settle down and disguise yourself as a small natural hillock. Until the next time you act, you appear to be a mound of dirt covered in grass and short evergreen bushes. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on Deception checks and DCs to [[/act impersonate options="impersonate:hillock"]] a hillock, and if you're untrained in Deception, your proficiency bonus to Deception checks is equal to your level. Impersonating a hillock takes you 1 action, rather than 10 minutes, and does not require you to have a disguise kit.

Treacherous Flora.name: 险恶植物群 Treacherous Flora
Treacherous Flora.description:
频率 每日一次

一丛尖锐叶片与布满荆棘的枝条、海藻、真菌、蔬菜或花朵从你的身体上翻滚坠落，向外倾泻，在灵光范围内的地面上制造困难地形。持续1分钟，你在自身周围获得一个危险植物灵光，范围为@Template[type:emanation|distance:10]。灵光范围内的地面为困难地形，且在灵光范围内地面上开始其回合的敌人会受到等同于你传承吐息武器的同类型伤害，数值等于你的等级（@Damage[@actor.level[poison]]），并需进行一次@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic]豁免，以你职业DC或法术DC中较高者为DC。

Frequency once per day

A thicket of sharp leaves and thorn-covered branches, kelp, fungi, vegetables, or flowers tumble down from your body, cascading outward and creating difficult terrain on the ground within the aura. For 1 minute, you gain a treacherous flora aura in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around you. The ground within the aura is difficult terrain, and foes who start their turn on the ground within the aura take damage of the same type as your heritage's breath weapon equal to your level (@Damage[@actor.level[poison]]), with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of you class DC or spell DC.

Fungal Stampede.name: 真菌狂奔 Fungal Stampede
Fungal Stampede.description:
频率 每天一次

你横冲直撞地碾过你的敌人，如同你的真菌先祖一般践踏他们。疾步两次，在移动途中可以穿过任何挡路生物的空间，对这些生物造成 @Damage[16d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并以你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者为基准进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免；若该生物比你更小且其豁免大失败，则其还会被击倒 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。你的移动不会触发反应动作。

Frequency once per day

You run roughshod over your foes, trampling over them like your fungal forbears. Stride twice, moving through the spaces of any creatures in your way, dealing those creatures @Damage[16d6[bludgeoning]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC; if the creature is smaller than you and critically fails their save, they're also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Your movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Twinkling Hover.name: 闪烁悬浮 Twinkling Hover
Twinkling Hover.description:
频率 每轮一次

你在空气中短暂悬停。你飞行。若你通常没有飞行速度，你在此次移动中获得15尺的飞行速度。若你在此次移动结束时不在坚实地面上，你会坠落。

Frequency once per round

You hover briefly in the air. You Fly. If you don't normally have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 15 feet for this movement. If you aren't on solid ground at the end of this movement, you fall.

Wink Out.name: 眨眼消失 Wink Out
Wink Out.description:
当你熄灭在你形体上舞动的无热、幽灵般的火焰时，你的身体从视线中淡去，滑入光与影的边界之间。你每小时可以将4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB] 作为一项异能天生法术施放一次。施放此法术会自动压制你的天生辉光，无需花费一个动作。

When you quench the heatless, ghostly flames that dance across your form, your body fades from sight, slipping between the borders of light and shadow. You can cast 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB] as an occult innate spell once per hour. Casting this spell automatically suppresses your innate glow without spending an action.

Wispflame.name: 鬼火焰 Wispflame
Wispflame.description:
你可以将一小片你的赋生命质穿过空气发射出去以伤害你的敌人。你获得一项 wispflame 远程徒手攻击，射程增量为30英尺，并具有魔法（特征），造成1d4点伤害，其伤害类型来自你的光源（通常为电击或火焰伤害），并且属于斗殴武器组。

You can launch a tiny fragment of your animating essence through the air to harm your foes. You gain a wispflame ranged unarmed attack with a range increment of 30 feet and the magical trait that deals 1d4 damage of the type from your light source (typically electricity or fire damage) and is in the brawling weapon group.

Fungal Concoctor.name: 真菌调制师 Fungal Concoctor
Fungal Concoctor.description:
你可以运用自己对真菌的广博知识来酿制有用的材料。无论你选择将这些知识用于治疗伤势，还是制作致命毒素，你的天然亲和力都能派上用场。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.y7DDs03GtDnmhxFp]{Poisoner Dedication} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MJg24e9fJd7OASvF]{Medic Dedication} 之一；你必须满足该专长的正常先决条件，但即使你通常在从当前变体获得更多专长之前不能再选取另一个献身专长，你仍然会获得该专长。

You can use your extensive knowledge of fungi to brew up useful materials. Whether you choose to apply that knowledge to treat injuries or craft deadly toxins, your natural affinity comes in handy. You gain either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.y7DDs03GtDnmhxFp]{Poisoner Dedication} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MJg24e9fJd7OASvF]{Medic Dedication}; you must meet the feat's normal prerequisites, but you gain the feat even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype.

Confounding Disappearance.name: 困惑性消失 Confounding Disappearance
Confounding Disappearance.description:
你可以从视线中完全消失，同时召唤一个完美的幻象来吸引你敌人的注意并扰乱他们的感官。只需一个念头，你的影像便如同在荡漾水面上的倒影般分裂开来，在原地只留下一个逼真的魅影。你可以每小时一次，以先天法术施放6环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi] 作为秘法先天法术。施放该法术会自动压制你的先天辉光，无需花费一个动作。此外，如果在你施放该法术之前你的辉光处于激活状态，则该法术创造的幻象复制体会产生你辉光灵光的一个复制品。

You can vanish entirely from sight while conjuring a perfect illusion to draw your foes’ attention and confound their senses. With a thought, your image splits like a reflection across rippling water, leaving only a convincing phantom in your place. You can cast 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi] as an occult innate spell once per hour. Casting this spell automatically suppresses your innate glow without spending an action. Additionally, if your glow was active before you cast the spell, the illusory duplicate that the spell creates produces a replica of your glow aura.

Searing Tendril.name: 灼热触须 Searing Tendril
Searing Tendril.description:
你能够投射的光之触须变成致命的武器。你获得一次触须徒手攻击，其造成1d6点伤害，伤害类型与你的光源相同（通常为电击或火焰伤害）。你的触须具有灵巧、魔法与徒手特性，并属于搏斗武器组。

The tendrils of light that you can project become lethal weapons. You gain a tendril unarmed attack that deals 1d6 damage of the type from your light source (typically electricity or fire damage). Your tendril has the finesse, magical, and unarmed traits and is in the brawling weapon group.

Cluster's Coordination.name: 集群协调 Cluster's Coordination
Cluster's Coordination.description:
你引导自己在大型群落中的群居生活，以便更轻松地协助盟友。你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助} 的检定时获得+4环境加值。

You channel your communal life in large colonies to more easily assist your allies. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus on checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid}.

Mycelial Clone.name: 菌丝分身 Mycelial Clone
Mycelial Clone.description:
菌丝网络擅长储存与传递信息，但你已将对菌丝的掌控提升到了新的层次。你可以花费 1 小时创造一个与你自身相同的菌丝克隆体，并将其与你的灵魂相连。这个克隆体会维持在类似睡眠的恍惚中，无法以任何方式行动，不过它会持续接收关于你的记忆与经历的稳定信息流。蘑菇人通常会在安全地点制造克隆体，例如在地下，附着于树根之上。制造第二个克隆体会打破你灵魂与第一个克隆体的连接，使其散解为无智慧的真菌。

若你在拥有一个活跃克隆体时死亡，灵魂连接会将你的灵魂拉入克隆体，阻止你前往来世。克隆体拥有你所有的记忆与能力，并且现在可以正常行动。克隆体可能是你意识与人格的延续，或者根据其生长的环境条件而拥有不同的人格。你死亡时影响你身体的负面状态不会转移至克隆体，但影响你心智或灵体的状态（例如诅咒）会转移。

克隆的身体需要一些时间才能准备好制造新的克隆体。在通过重生进入克隆体而避开死亡之后，你在 1 个月内无法再次制造新的克隆体。

Mycelial networks are skilled at storing and transferring information, but you've taken your mastery over mycelia to the next level. You can spend 1 hour to create a mycelial clone of yourself and link it to your soul. This clone remains in a sleeplike trance and can't act in any way, though they receive a steady stream of information about your memories and experiences. Mushies typically create their clones in secure locations, such as underground, attached to the roots of trees. Creating a second clone breaks your soul's link to the first clone, causing it to disperse into nonsapient fungi.

If you die while you have an active clone, the soul link draws your soul into the clone, preventing you from passing on to the afterlife. The clone has all of your memories and abilities and can now act normally. The clone might be a continuation of your consciousness and personality, or they may have a different personality depending upon the conditions of their growth. Negative conditions that affected your body when you died don't transfer to the clone, but conditions affecting your mind or spirit, such as curses, do transfer.

It takes some time for a cloned body to be ready to produce a new clone. After avoiding death by rebirthing into a clone, you can't make a new clone again for 1 month.

Smother Light.name: 闷灭光 Smother Light
Smother Light.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你的光已被熄灭，而你也能将同样的命运施加于穿过你道路的其他光源。你抽离空气与神秘力量，以切断60英尺内一处无人看管光源的燃料。小型非魔法光源，如火把与提灯，会自动熄灭；区域至多为1格的非魔法火焰也会熄灭。要熄灭一处魔法光源，尝试一次@Check[class-spell]{反制}检定。你的反制阶位等于你等级的一半（向上取整），你的反制调整值等于你的职业DC –10或你的法术DC –10中较高者。反制一处魔法光源会压制其光持续1分钟，但不会压制任何其他效果。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Your light has been extinguished, and you can inflict that same fate on other lights that cross your path. You draw away both air and mystical power to cut off the fuel from an unattended light within 60 feet. Small non-magical light sources like torches and lanterns are automatically extinguished, as are non-magical flames with an area of up to 1 square. To extinguish a magical light source, attempt a @Check[class-spell]{Counteract} check. Your counteract rank is equal to half your level (rounded up) and your counteract modifier is equal to the higher of your class DC –10 or your spell DC –10. Counteracting a magical light source suppresses its light for 1 minute but does not suppress any other effects.

Massive Mushroom.name: 巨型蘑菇 Massive Mushroom
Massive Mushroom.description:
创造你的真菌孢子源自一种格外巨大的物种。你已经变得足够强壮，能够激活这些孢子沉睡的潜能并经历一次显著的生长突增。你变为大型，持续获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV] 的效果。

特殊 若伪孢子蘑菇人是由来自大型族裔的孢子制成，则在GM酌情决定下，可能拥有选择此专长的许可。

The fungal spores that created you originated from a particularly massive species. You've become strong enough to activate these spores' dormant potential and undergo a major growth spurt. You become Large, gaining the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV] constantly.

Special Pseudospore mushies who are made with spores from a Large ancestry might have access to this feat at the GM's discretion.

Feed on Fear.name: 以恐惧为食 Feed on Fear
Feed on Fear.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 30英尺内的一名生物处于恐慌或具有濒死（状态）

你品味恐惧的滋味，无论是对特定威胁的畏惧，还是对迫近死亡的存在性恐怖。你获得等同于处于恐慌或濒死的生物等级两倍数量的临时生命值。你也获得如同吃过一顿正餐般的饱足感。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements A creature within 30 feet is frightened or has the dying condition

You savor the taste of terror, whether it be fear of a specific threat or the existential dread of impending death. You gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to twice the frightened or dying creature's level. You also gain nourishment as if you'd eaten a full meal.

Endless Flora.name: 无尽繁茂 Endless Flora
Endless Flora.description:
你那阴险的植物再生速度比大多数永恒莱西龙还快。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.LpxF6MynyCcpk128]{Treacherous Flora} 的使用频率从每天1次改为每小时1次。

Your treacherous flora regrow faster than most aeternal leshy dragons. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.LpxF6MynyCcpk128]{Treacherous Flora} once per hour instead of once per day.

Monospore Mimicry.name: 单孢拟态 Monospore Mimicry
Monospore Mimicry.description:
当其他传承的蘑菇人会在培育时将其适应潜能的大部分用于与其他物种杂交，而你将这种潜能保留到了成年。对一个位于你触及内的敌人进行一次近战打击。若该攻击命中，它造成其通常的伤害，并且你提取并吸收其部分精华来保护自己。你得知该生物在酸、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波伤害中，对哪些伤害类型具有抗力或免疫。若该生物对这些元素中的至少一种具有抗力或免疫，则选择一种他们所防护的元素。你获得等同于你等级一半的该元素抗力，持续1分钟。

特殊 若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.GxtCSjpjbdBk4MlJ]{Spore Shot}或@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.xK6LSS6Gv07FAj7r]{Spore Spray}专长，则当你从单孢拟态获得抗力时，你的Spore Shot获得相同伤害类型的多用特性，并且你可以选择让你的Spore Spray造成该伤害类型。无论哪种情况，若这导致一种对这些专长而言通常不可能的伤害类型，则在必要时使用毒素伤害的特殊效果（添加力竭（状态））。

While mushies of other heritages use much of their adaptive potential to hybridize with other species at cultivation, you've retained that potential into adulthood. Make a melee Strike against a foe within your reach. If the attack hits, it deals its typical damage, and you extract and absorb some of their essence to defend yourself. You learn which of acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage the creature has a resistance or immunity to. If the creature has a resistance or immunity to at least one of these elements, choose one element that they are warded against. You gain an amount of resistance equal to half your level against that element for 1 minute.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.GxtCSjpjbdBk4MlJ]{Spore Shot} or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.xK6LSS6Gv07FAj7r]{Spore Spray} feat, while you have resistance from Monospore Mimicry, your Spore Shot gains the versatile trait for the same damage type and you can choose to have your Spore Spray deal that damage type. In either case, if this results in a damage type not normally possible for those feats, use the special effect from poison damage (adding the enfeebled condition) if necessary.

Hyphae Network.name: 菌丝网络 Hyphae Network
Hyphae Network.description:
当你站在一种比坚实石头更柔软可塑的表面上时，你的菌丝会延伸进地面以探测细微的震动。你获得不精确的颤动感知，射程为20英尺。你也可以使用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.wdARdD73NPJrWOxl]{延伸菌丝}动作。

When standing on a surface that is more pliable than solid stone, your hyphae extend into the ground to detect subtle vibrations. You gain imprecise tremorsense with a range of 20 feet. You can also use the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.wdARdD73NPJrWOxl]{Extend Hyphae} action.

Smushie.name: 冰沙 Smushie
Smushie.description:
你可以把身体挤压到足以进入狭窄空间的程度，并从任何试图束缚你的事物中扭动脱身。你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze} 的检定时获得+1环境加值，并且当你在进行挤压或逃脱时大失败，你改为失败。

You can squish your body down to fit into narrow spaces and wriggle out of anything that would attempt to restrain you. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze}, and when you critically fail while Squeezing or Escaping, you get a failure instead.

Tiny Transformation.name: 微型变形 Tiny Transformation
Tiny Transformation.description:
你是由空气与光构成的生物，其特性远比传统血肉更具可塑性。你可以将身体压缩成紧凑的动物形态。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl] 的效果，直到你再次使用 Tiny Transformation 以结束该效果。

You are a creature of air and light, features far more malleable than conventional flesh. You can compress your body into a compact animal form. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl] until you use Tiny Transformation again to end the effect.

Extended Hover.name: 延长悬停 Extended Hover
Extended Hover.description:
你可以在不接触坚实地面的情况下覆盖更远的距离。你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.PJISFLeMO4DTIkcF]{Twinkling Hover} 获得的飞行速度提升至25英尺。

You can cover a greater distance without touching down on solid ground. The fly Speed you gain from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.PJISFLeMO4DTIkcF]{Twinkling Hover} increases to 25 feet.

Pathogenic Coexistence.name: 病原共存 Pathogenic Coexistence
Pathogenic Coexistence.description:
作为单孢子蘑菇人，你的身体拥有尚未开发的潜能，能够与不同物种共存而不受伤害。你对抗疾病、对抗真菌，以及对抗代表孢子或微观生物的环境危害时的所有豁免检定获得+1环境加值。若你在因该加值而受益的豁免检定上掷骰得到成功，则改为大成功；若你拥有另一项也会以这种方式提升豁免的不同能力（例如战士（职业）的久经沙场职业特性），则当你在该豁免上掷骰得到大失败时，改为失败。

As a monospore mushie, your body has untapped potential to coexist with different species without coming to harm. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to all saving throws against diseases, against fungi, and against environmental hazards that represent spores or microscopic organisms. If you roll a success on a saving throw benefiting from this bonus, you get a critical success instead; if you have a different ability that would improve the save in this way (such as the battle hardened fighter class feature), if you roll a critical failure on the save you get a failure instead.

Squishie.name: 脆皮 Squishie
Squishie.description:
触发 你将要受到钝击伤害

你的身体会迅速从钝击中反弹，通过挤压而非破裂来吸收冲击。你获得等同于你等级的抗力，用于抵御触发的钝击伤害。若触发的伤害是坠落伤害，则你改为完全抵消该坠落伤害。

Trigger You would take bludgeoning damage

Your body quickly rebounds from blunt impacts by squishing instead of breaking. You gain an amount of resistance equal to your level against the triggering bludgeoning damage. If the triggering damage is falling damage, you instead negate the falling damage entirely.

Polyspore Mushie.name: 多孢蘑菇怪 Polyspore Mushie
Polyspore Mushie.description:
你由两种或更多强健的真菌菌株培育而成。其中一种菌株在你早期生长中占据主导，但随着时代推移，第二种菌株的影响逐渐增强，塑造了你的身体以及你的力量。选择一个你尚未拥有的、列于本专长先决条件中的传承。你获得该传承及其益处。

You were cultivated from two or more strong strains of fungi. One of these strains predominated in your early growth, but a second strain's influence has grown over time, shaping your body as well as your powers. Choose one of the heritages listed in this feat's prerequisites that you don't already have. You gain that heritage and its benefits.

Herbal Growths.name: 草药增生 Herbal Growths
Herbal Growths.description:
生长在你身体各处的植物或真菌具有药用特性，可以采收用来制作天然的药膏与疗法。你可以在不使用医者工具的情况下进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}，并且你的盟友也可以在不使用医者工具的情况下对你进行 Treat Wounds。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WC4xLBGmBsdOdHWu]{Natural Medicine} 技能专长。每天一次，当你使用自然来 Treat Wounds 时，你或一名拥有 Natural Medicine 的盟友可以从你身体上采摘新鲜的药用材料，即使你不在荒野中也能获得新鲜材料。

The plants or fungi growing across your body have medicinal properties and can be harvested to create natural poultices and remedies. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} without healer's tools, and your allies can Treat your Wounds without healer's tools. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WC4xLBGmBsdOdHWu]{Natural Medicine} skill feat. Once per day, you or an ally with Natural Medicine can pick fresh medicinal ingredients from your body while using Nature to Treat Wounds, granting fresh ingredients even if you're not in the wilderness.

Stalksight.name: 潜踪视野 Stalksight
Stalksight.description:
你无法抗拒满足好奇心的机会。你的身体已经对你爱管闲事的天性作出反应，让你能够伸长你的眼柄去偷看你本不该看见的东西。你 [[/act seek]]，并将你的起始方格选择为任意一个与你相邻的方格。这可能让你能够看到拐角或障碍物的另一侧，从站在你前方的生物肩膀上方偷看，或以其他方式四处窥探。如果你处于躲藏状态，使用 Stalksight 不会自动让你变为被观察到，但你必须进行一次新的秘密潜行检定以避免被发现。

You can't resist an opportunity to sate your curiosity. Your body has responded to your meddlesome nature, allowing you to extend your eyestalks to peek at things you shouldn't be able to see. You [[/act seek]], choosing your starting square as any square adjacent to yourself. This can potentially allow you to see around corners or barriers, to peek over the shoulder of a creature standing in front of you, or otherwise snoop around. If you are Hiding, using Stalksight doesn't automatically make you observed, but you must attempt a new secret Stealth check to avoid being caught.

Clinging Climb.name: 紧附攀爬 Clinging Climb
Clinging Climb.description:
无论你分泌黏稠的黏液怪，还是使用诸如球茎或根须之类的特性来附着在表面上，你都是攀爬大师。你获得10尺的攀爬速度。

Whether you exude sticky slime or use features like bulbs or roots to cling to surfaces, you're a masterful climber. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet.

Sculpt Light.name: 塑造光 Sculpt Light
Sculpt Light.description:
你以极其谨慎的方式塑造从你身体散发出的光。作为一个专注动作，你可以改变你辉光所发出的光的体型与强度，将其降低到如摇曳烛光般微弱，或提高到如咆哮篝火般炽盛。你在自己选择的半径内散发光照，最大至80英尺，其中明亮光照的半径至多为40英尺，其余为昏暗光照。此外，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4] 作为一环秘法戏法施放。你如此做时，可以选择你能用辉光创造的任意半径与强度。

特殊 若你是 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.heritages.Item.y9eit9oXj127duYO]，你可以在进行 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.VdV5iGB8TDhvqHqZ]{Steer Constellation} 的动作的一部分时，对你的任意一个或全部星座之光的体型与强度进行相同的改变。

You sculpt the light that emanates from your body with great care. As a single concentrate action, you can alter the size and intensity of the light from your glow, bringing it down as low as a flickering candle or as high as a roaring bonfire. You shed light in a radius of your choice up to 80 feet, with at most a 40-foot radius of bright light and the rest of dim light. Additionally, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4] as an occult cantrip. When you do, you can choose any radius and intensity that you could create with your glow.

Special If you are a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.heritages.Item.y9eit9oXj127duYO], you can perform the same alterations on the size and intensity of any or all of your constellation lights as a part of the action to @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.VdV5iGB8TDhvqHqZ]{Steer Constellation}.

Ponderous Push.name: 笨重推击 Ponderous Push
Ponderous Push.description:
你喜欢搬动东西，尤其是当你能用你那富有弹性的肚皮时。你在运动中成为受训；如果你已经受训，你可以选择在运动中成为专家，或在你选择的另一项技能中成为受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{泰坦摔跤手}技能专长，并且你可以仅用你的肚皮对生物进行[[/act shove]]；当你这样做时，你可以推撞体型至多为超巨型的生物。

You enjoy moving things around, especially when you can use your bouncy belly. You become trained in Athletics; if you're already trained you can choose whether to become an expert in Athletics or to become trained in a different skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} skill feat, and you can [[/act shove]] creatures using only your belly; when you do, you can Shove creatures of up to size Gargantuan.

Trick of the Light.name: 光之诡计 Trick of the Light
Trick of the Light.description:
触发 一名对手疾步

你用迷惑性的光与扭曲的幻觉扰乱对手的方向感，诱使其走向错误的方向。该对手必须掷骰进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你更高的职业DC或法术DC。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在此次触发的疾步的剩余时间内，该生物进入的所有方格均为困难地形。

大成功或大失败 在此次触发的疾步的剩余时间内，该生物按你选择的方向与路径移动。这是强迫移动。

Trigger An opponent Strides

You confound your opponent's sense of direction with beguiling lights and twisting hallucinations, tricking them into walking in the wrong direction. The opponent must roll a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For the rest of the triggering Stride, all squares the creature enters are difficult terrain.

Critical Failure The creature moves in a direction and path of your choosing for the rest of the triggering Stride. This is forced movement.

Mycelial Speaker.name: 菌丝代言者 Mycelial Speaker
Mycelial Speaker.description:
你的信号孢子让你无需共享语言即可与真菌建立基本交流。你可以向真菌提问、从真菌处获得回答，并对真菌使用交涉（技能）。你在与真菌进行交涉检定时获得+2环境加值。

Your signaling spores let you establish rudimentary communication with fungi without the need for a shared language. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with fungi. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks with fungi.

Twinkling Companion.name: 闪烁伙伴 Twinkling Companion
Twinkling Companion.description:
你吸引了一小点忠诚跟随你的光点。你获得一只魔宠。你可以花费 1 个魔宠能力来给予你的魔宠辉光，如同你的族裔能力。

特殊 如果你已经从其他特性获得了一只魔宠，你可以选择闪烁同伴，以永久给予你的魔宠辉光族裔能力，而不消耗魔宠能力。

You've drawn in a little mote of light that loyally follows you. You gain a familiar. You can spend 1 familiar ability to give your familiar glow, as your ancestry ability.

Special If you already have a familiar from some other feature, you can take Twinkling Companion to grant your familiar the glow ancestry ability permanently without costing a familiar ability.

Soul Beacon.name: 灵魂信标 Soul Beacon
Soul Beacon.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 60尺内的一个闹鬼被完全禁用，或60尺内的一个不死生物被摧毁。

需求 你必须在过去1分钟内要么成功通过一次用于禁用该闹鬼的检定，要么对该不死生物造成过伤害；你不需要在最终检定中成功或打出最后一击。

不了解内情的人可能会把你误认为迷失的灵魂，尤其是当他们看见注定沉沦的灵体聚集在你身边时。但他们错了——你并非死亡牵引下的受害者，而是一名安静的牧者，引导逝者走向安宁。你帮助这些迷失的灵魂找到新的道路，缓解他们的折磨，并给予他们最后一次获得清明的机会。触发的闹鬼或不死生物的灵魂碎片会附着在你身上1分钟，低声诉说些许记忆或遗憾。在此期间，你可以尝试一次察觉检定来[[/act sense-motive]]，以获得一条关于该灵魂动机的线索，例如此人变为不死生物之前的欲望，或该闹鬼未竟之事。该检定的DC为该不死生物或闹鬼的等级对应的标准DC。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger A haunt within 60 feet is fully disabled or an undead within 60 feet is destroyed.

Requirements You must have either succeeded at a check to disable the haunt or dealt damage to the undead in the last minute; you don't need to succeed at the final check or deal the final blow.

The uninformed might mistake you for a lost soul, especially if they see doomed spirits flocking to you. But they are mistaken—for you are no victim of death's pull, but a quiet shepherd guiding the fallen toward peace. You help these lost souls find a new path, easing their torment and granting them one final chance at clarity. A fragment of the triggering haunt or undead's soul clings to you for 1 minute, whispering faint memories or regrets. During this time, you can attempt a Perception check to [[/act sense-motive]] to receive a clue about the soul's motivations, such as the desires of the person prior to becoming undead or the haunt's unfinished business. The DC of the check is a standard DC for the undead or haunt's level.

Repel Magic.name: 排斥魔法 Repel Magic
Repel Magic.description:
触发 你尝试对抗一个魔法效果进行豁免，但你尚未掷骰。

有害的魔法很难附着在你不断变化的身体上。直到本回合结束，你对抗魔法效果的豁免获得+1环境加值。该加值也适用于触发的豁免。

Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a magical effect, but you haven't rolled yet.

It's difficult for harmful magic to cling to your ever-shifting body. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against magical effects until the end of this turn. This bonus also applies to the triggering save.

Reject Magic.name: 拒绝魔法 Reject Magic
Reject Magic.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你在对抗一个法术的豁免中失败，该法术对你施加了具有持续时间的效果（例如负面状态），且该效果仍在生效

有害的魔法或许已将你攫住，但你可以激活你与生俱来的抗力来松动它的钳制。对该法术进行一次新的豁免掷骰。若你的新结果优于你原本的结果，则以你新结果的效果取代你最初豁免结果所造成的持续效果。“拒斥魔法”不会撤销该法术在过去已造成的任何效果，例如已承受的伤害。

你不能对同一个法术使用“拒斥魔法”超过一次，即使其持续时间超过1小时。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You failed a saving throw against a spell that imposes an effect with a duration on you, such as a negative condition, and that effect is still active

Harmful magic might have caught you in its grasp, but you can activate your innate resistance to loosen its grip. Roll a new saving throw against the spell. If your new result is better than your original result, replace the ongoing effects from your initial saving throw result with the effects from your new one. Reject Magic doesn't undo any effects the spell had in the past, such as damage taken.

You can't use Reject Magic more than once on the same spell, even if its duration is more than 1 hour.

Spore Explosion.name: 孢子爆炸 Spore Explosion
Spore Explosion.description:
频率 每小时一次

你用微小的孢子荚为一片区域播下种子，这些孢子荚在被扰动时会爆炸成有毒云雾。孢子荚覆盖60英尺内的一个 @Template[square|distance:10] ，并持续1小时或直到被扰动。一名进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索} 的生物可以通过一次 @Check[perception|against:class-spell|rollerRole:target] 检定注意到孢子；察觉DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。若一名体型为小型或更大的生物踩到有孢子荚的方格，孢子荚会喷发，释放其孢子。区域内所有生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，以避免受到 @Damage[10d6[poison]] 伤害并让其眼睛被孢子填满。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态，随后在1分钟内目眩。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并在1分钟内目盲。

Frequency once per hour

You seed an area with tiny spore pods that detonate into toxic clouds when disturbed. The spore pods cover a @Template[square|distance:10] within 60 feet and last for 1 hour or until disturbed. A creature who @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searches} can notice the spores with a @Check[perception|against:class-spell|rollerRole:target] check; the Perception DC is equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC. If a creature of size Small or larger steps on a square with spore pods, the pods erupt, releasing their spores. All creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC to avoid taking @Damage[10d6[poison]] damage and having their eyes filled with spores.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and then dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is blinded for 1 minute.

Dazzling Strikes.name: 炫目打击 Dazzling Strikes
Dazzling Strikes.description:
你已精炼对流经你形体的奇异力量的掌握，发展出新的技巧，将你自身的身体化作活焰与灵体的武器。你获得你尚未拥有的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.Uic1IiMuwaTSkYfW]{Searing Tendril} 或 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.PrKCDR8besIjPbBP]{Wispflame} 专长之一（若你已同时拥有这两个专长，则改为获得你选择的另一个1级族裔专长）。当你以触须或鬼火焰打击造成大成功或大失败时，目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 状态，持续1轮。这是一个大成功或大失败专精效果。

You've refined your mastery over the strange power that courses through your form, developing new techniques to wield your very body as a weapon of living flame and spirit. You gain whichever of the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.Uic1IiMuwaTSkYfW]{Searing Tendril} or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.PrKCDR8besIjPbBP]{Wispflame} feats that you didn't already have (or gain another 1st-level ancestry feat of your choice if you already had both feats). When you critically hit with a tendril or wispflame Strike, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. This is a critical specialization effect.

Plant Scholar.name: 植物学者 Plant Scholar
Plant Scholar.description:
你对植物的知识无与伦比。你受训于自然技能，并且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长，分别用于草药学识与植物学识。如果你本会自动在自然技能中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。

Your knowledge of plants is unmatched. You're trained in Nature and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feats for Herbalism Lore and Plant Lore. If you would automatically become trained in Nature (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

Incredible Palette.name: 不可思议调色板 Incredible Palette
Incredible Palette.description:
你的味觉超乎寻常，你可以安全地摄入各式各样的东西。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.fOIUmDGa9gkeCHA0]{Supertaster} 通用专长，即使你不满足察觉先决条件也一样。你还获得对抗你摄入之物的豁免+2环境加值，例如摄入型毒素与疾病。若你在此类豁免中掷骰得到成功，则改为大成功。

Your sense of taste is preternatural, and you can safely ingest all sorts of things. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.fOIUmDGa9gkeCHA0]{Supertaster} general feat, even if you don't meet the Perception prerequisite. You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against things you ingest, such as ingested poisons and diseases. If you roll a success on such a saving throw, you get a critical success instead.

Luminous Surge.name: 辉光涌动 Luminous Surge
Luminous Surge.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你当前正通过你的辉光能力发出光

你将自身的发光潜能凝聚成一次强力闪光，然后将其爆发出去以伤害你的敌人。处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的敌人受到@Damage[((1+ceil(@actor.level/2))d6)[@actor.flags.pf2e.lightSource]|options:area-damage]伤害，并进行一次@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。伤害类型由你的光源族裔能力决定。豁免失败的生物还会在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态；若为大失败，则在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}状态。

在15级以及此后每2级，伤害增加1d6，最高在19级时达到11d6伤害。

使用“光辉涌动”后，你的辉光会熄灭，且你在1分钟内无法恢复它。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You are currently emitting light from your glow ability

You gather your luminous potential into a potent flash before surging it out to harm your foes. Foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] take @Damage[((1+ceil(@actor.level/2))d6)[@actor.flags.pf2e.lightSource]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The damage type is determined by your light source ancestry ability. Creatures that fail the save are also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round on a critical failure.

The damage increases by 1d6 at 15th level and every 2 levels thereafter, to a maximum of 11d6 damage at 19th level.

After using Luminous Surge, your glow is extinguished, and you can't restore it for 1 minute.

Lantern's Resistance.name: 灯笼的抗力 Lantern's Resistance
Lantern's Resistance.description:
你天生就受到为你永恒光辉提供能量的元素保护。你获得等同于你等级一半的抗力，以抵御来自你的光源的伤害类型（电击或火焰，除非你是寒霜小精灵）。

You are innately protected against the element that powers your eternal glow. You gain resistance equal to half your level against the damage type from your light source (either electricity or fire, unless you're a frigid wisp).

Bouncy Cap.name: 弹跳帽 Bouncy Cap
Bouncy Cap.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发 一个打击对你严重失手，或一个打击因为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.1DuskqTP1hY4eFiG]{Sheltering Cap}提供的环境加值而未命中你。

你的对手可能想伤害你，但你的帽子实在太有弹性。你将触发的攻击改向一个相邻的生物。攻击者随后对你选择的目标重骰该次攻击。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger Either a Strike critically misses you, or a Strike misses you because of the circumstance bonus provided by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.1DuskqTP1hY4eFiG]{Sheltering Cap}.

Your opponent might have meant to hurt you, but your cap is simply too bouncy. You redirect the triggering attack to an adjacent creature. The attacker then rerolls the attack against your chosen target.

Reconceptualize.name: 重新构想 Reconceptualize
Reconceptualize.description:
你对自身次级形态的外观拥有更强的掌控力。每当你采取次级形态时，你可以改变你表面上的身高、体重、脸型、性别标记以及其他身体特性，只要这些变化仍在你所拟形怪的族裔所可能具有的范围之内。你无法复制某个特定个体的特征。

虽然大多数鬼火的族裔会因其发光的躯体而显而易见，但你能以极高的精确度改变你的光，使你看起来像是你次级形态所拟形怪的族裔成员。你可以使用 [[/act impersonate]] 来假装属于该族裔，而无需伪装工具包。

You gain greater control over the appearance of your secondary form. Whenever you assume your secondary form, you can change your apparent height, weight, face shape, gender markers, and other physical features, so long as they are within the bounds of possibility for the ancestry that you are mimicking. You can't replicate the features of a specific individual.

While the ancestry of most will-o'-wisps is obvious from their glowing bodies, you can alter your light with such precision that you appear to be a member of the ancestry that your secondary form mimics. You can use [[/act impersonate]] to pretend to belong to that ancestry without a disguise kit.

Fascinating Cuteness.name: 迷人的可爱 Fascinating Cuteness
Fascinating Cuteness.description:
频率 每小时一次

你开心地拍打着帽子并跳起舞来，以分散周围人的注意力。所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者，以避免被迷住。通常，与您一同旅行了相当长时间的生物（例如你的队友）对你的“迷人可爱”免疫。你可以维持“迷人可爱”最长 1 分钟。

成功 该生物不受影响，并在 24 小时内对“迷人可爱”暂时免疫。

失败 该生物因你的可爱而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷} 状态。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但若你攻击该生物的盟友，着迷不会结束；若你攻击受着迷的生物本身，则仍会照常结束。

Frequency once per hour

You beat happily on your cap and do a dance to distract those around you. All creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC to avoid being entranced. Typically, creatures that have traveled with you for a significant time, such as your fellow party members, are immune to your Fascinating Cuteness. You can Sustain Fascinating Cuteness for up to 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune to Fascinating Cuteness for 24 hours.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by your cuteness.

Critical Failure As failure, except the fascination does not end if you attack one of the creature's allies; it still ends normally if you attack the fascinated creature.

Sprout Mushroom Ring.name: 萌芽蘑菇环 Sprout Mushroom Ring
Sprout Mushroom Ring.description:
频率 每小时一次

仙灵和伞菌龙也许会专注于蘑菇环的神秘特性，称之为仙灵环。但你并未忽视其更为切实的起源。你使巨人蘑菇在你60尺内的一处地面上以15尺半径成环状迸发而出（本质上，它们填满一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]的外侧24个方格，形成一个单环且对角方向没有空隙）。这些蘑菇高5尺、宽5尺，它们为穿过的生物提供更强的困难地形，并提供标准掩蔽。蘑菇在外观上粗略地与你相似，使你的所在位置难以分辨。若你本会从蘑菇获得掩蔽，你改为获得更强掩蔽。1分钟后，这些蘑菇会缩小。如果地面适合蘑菇生长，它们会变成一圈该地区原生的正常大小蘑菇。否则，它们会化为尘埃。

Frequency once per hour

Fairies and toadstool dragons might focus on the mystical properties of rings of mushrooms, calling them fairy rings. But you haven't lost sight of their more tangible origins. You cause giant mushrooms to spring up on the ground in a ring with a 15-foot radius within 60 feet of you (essentially, they fill the outer 24 squares of a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15], a single ring with no diagonal gaps). The mushrooms are 5 feet tall and 5 feet wide, and they provide greater difficult terrain to creatures passing through them, as well as standard cover. The mushrooms superficially resemble you, making your location hard to distinguish. If you would have cover from the mushrooms, you instead gain greater cover. After 1 minute, the mushrooms shrink down. If the ground is suitable for mushroom growth, they turn into a ring of normal-sized mushrooms of a type that's native to the region. Otherwise, they turn into dust.

Mushroom Messenger.name: 蘑菇信使 Mushroom Messenger
Mushroom Messenger.description:
你一直担任最关键且备受尊敬的信使角色，在遥远的聚居地之间传递重要情报。你总能确保自己携带的信息送达预定的收件人——所以，如果你的好奇心偶尔驱使你在转交前偷看一眼信件，这真的能怪你吗？你在社交获得受训（熟练度）熟练度等级，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WeQGWvlWdeLeOlCN]{Glean Contents} 技能专长。此外，当你尝试进行欺瞒或隐匿检定以避免因开启封缄信件、偷偷从别人肩膀上窥视文件，或以其他方式阅读并非写给你的讯息而被抓包时，你获得+1环境加值。

You've held the most essential and respected role of messenger, carrying vital information between distant settlements. You always ensure that the information you carry reaches its intended recipient, so can you really be blamed if your curiosity sometimes drives you to take a peek at a letter before passing it along? You gain the trained proficiency rank in Society and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WeQGWvlWdeLeOlCN]{Glean Contents} skill feat. Additionally, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to any Deception or Stealth checks you attempt to avoid being caught opening sealed letters, surreptitiously peering at a document over someone's shoulder, or otherwise reading messages that aren't intended for you.

Sticky Constellation.name: 黏滞星座 Sticky Constellation
Sticky Constellation.description:
你的星座幽絮拥有黏性的触须，使其能够附着在他人身上。当你的星座幽絮进入一个自愿生物的方格时，你可以将幽絮附着在该生物身上。幽絮会随被附着的生物一起移动。只要幽絮仍保持附着，它就可以移出你的视觉线，并在距离你最多500英尺处也不会闪烁消失并返回到你身边。你始终知晓你的幽絮与你之间的距离与方向。当你说话时，你可以选择由你的哪些（如果有的话）星座幽絮传递你声音的回响。虽然生物无法通过幽絮直接与你交流，但它们或许可以通过以预先约定的模式移动自身（从而带动你所附着的幽絮），借助你对距离与方向的感知，在远处向你传递信息。

Your constellation wisps have sticky tendrils that allow them to attach to others. When your constellation wisp enters the square of a willing creature, you can attach the wisp to that creature. The wisp moves with the attached creature. As long as the wisp remains attached, it can move out of your line of sight and up to 500 feet away from you without winking out and returning to you. You are always aware of the distance and direction to your wisps. When you speak, you can choose which (if any) of your constellation wisps transmit echoes of your voice. While creatures can't communicate with you directly through the wisp, they might be able to send you messages at a distance by moving themselves (and thus your attached wisp) in pre-arranged patterns, counting on your awareness of the distance and direction to get across the message.

Phantasmal Senses.name: 幻象感官 Phantasmal Senses
Phantasmal Senses.description:
你对灵体精华的祖传熟悉已发展为对灵魂能量的持续感知。你获得灵体感官，作为一种射程为30尺的模糊感官。灵体感官使你能感知射程内生物的灵体，包括活的生物、大多数非无心智的不死生物，以及出没现象。如同你的听觉与其他模糊感官一样，你仍需要 [[/act seek]] 才能定位一个未被侦测到的生物。

由于灵体感官侦测的是灵体精华而非物理躯体，它可以侦测由法术投射出的灵体，例如投影影像，或侦测占据了原本无灵魂的物体的灵体。它无法侦测无灵魂的躯体、构装体或物体，并且如同大多数感官一样，它无法穿透坚固物体。

Your ancestral familiarity with spiritual essence has developed into a constant sense for the energy of souls. You gain spiritsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet. Spiritsense enables you to sense the spirits of creatures, including living creatures, most non-mindless undead, and haunts within the listed range. As with your hearing and other imprecise senses, you still need to [[/act seek]] to locate an undetected creature.

As spiritsense detects spiritual essence, not physical bodies, it can detect spirits projected by spells such as project image or possessing otherwise soulless objects. It can't detect soulless bodies, constructs, or objects, and like most senses, it doesn't penetrate through solid objects.

Spore Spray.name: 孢子喷射 Spore Spray
Spore Spray.description:
频率 每小时一次

你释放一阵武器化的孢子洪流来压制你的敌人。你选择的一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]或一个@Template[type:cone|distance:60]内的所有生物必须针对孢子进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell]豁免，孢子造成@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)+1)d6[poison]|options:area-damage]伤害并具有额外效果。13级以上每高2级，伤害增加1d6，19级时最多为11d6伤害。你可以选择不造成毒素伤害：若你是幻灵菇，则改为灵体伤害；若你是打击菇，则改为音波伤害；若你是球泡菇，则改为酸蚀伤害；若你具有任何其他传承，则改为精神伤害。若你选择精神伤害，豁免类型改为意志。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害。若你造成毒素伤害，则其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}直到你下个回合开始；若你造成精神伤害，则其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}直到你下个回合结束；若你造成灵体伤害，则其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}直到你下个回合开始；若你造成音波伤害，则其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}持续1分钟。若你造成酸蚀伤害，则其速度获得–10尺的环境减值，持续1轮或直到其逃脱，以先发生者为准。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害。若你造成毒素伤害，则其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}直到你下个回合开始；若你造成精神伤害，则其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}直到你下个回合结束。若你造成酸蚀、音波或灵体伤害，则其除了承受一次失败的效果外，还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

Frequency once per hour

You release a torrent of weaponized spores to overwhelm your foes. All creatures in your choice of a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] or a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] must roll a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the spores, which deal @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)+1)d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage and have additional effects. Increase the damage by 1d6 for every 2 levels above 13, to a maximum of 11d6 damage at level 19. Instead of dealing poison damage, you can choose to deal spirit damage if you are a phantasmal mushie, sonic damage if you are a percussive mushie, acid damage if you are a bulbous mushie, or mental damage if you have any other heritage. If you choose mental damage, the saving throw type changes to Will.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage. They are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn if you dealt poison damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn if you dealt mental damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your start of your next turn if you dealt spirit damage, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute if you dealt sonic damage. If you dealt acid damage, they take a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round or until they Escape, whichever comes first.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage. They are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the start of your next turn if you dealt poison damage or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until the end of your next turn if you dealt mental damage. If you dealt acid, sonic, or spirit damage, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} in addition to the effects from a failure.

Hypnotic Gaze.name: 催眠凝视 Hypnotic Gaze
Hypnotic Gaze.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你聚焦你的眼斑以催眠并吸引一名敌人。一名60尺内的生物必须尝试进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标必须在其下一次动作中向你迈步移动，如果这次移动结束时与您相邻，则会坠落 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

大失败 同失败，但目标必须在其下一回合中用尽其所有动作来如此行动。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You focus your eyespots to hypnotize and draw in one of your foes. One creature within 60 feet must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class or spell DC.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target must use its next action to Stride toward you, falling @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} if it ends this movement adjacent to you.

Critical Failure As a failure, except the target must use all of its actions on its next turn to do so.

Curious Nature.name: 好奇天性 Curious Nature
Curious Nature.description:
你天生好奇并信任他人。即使在最糟糕的情况下，你也仍抱持着和平解决的希望。然而当这些希望破灭时，你会迅速付诸行动来保护你的朋友。在战斗的第一个轮中，在你行动之前，你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}状态。若你在第一个轮中行动前因措手不及导致的AC减值使你受到了本来可以避免的伤害，则你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态1轮。你只能用这个额外动作来疾行或挪步。

You are intrinsically curious and trusting of others. Even in the worst circumstances, you hold out hope for a peaceful solution. When these hopes are dashed, though, you are quick to spring into action to protect your friends. During the first round of combat, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until you have acted.
